db_upgrade_needed_content:
The application detected an outdated database version and requires an upgrade to continue.

The upgrade will optimize data storage structure to support the latest features.

⚠️ Please do not close the program during the upgrade.

db_upgrade_success_content: Database has been successfully upgraded to the latest version.

Database upgrade failed: {error}

Please check the log file or contact technical support.

dialog_doubao_rebuild_content:
This will clear all AI-generated concept tags and run the background pipeline to re-tag the entire market.
It may take minutes to hours to complete. The app remains usable during this time.

Continue?

sys_init_confirm_content:
🚨 HIGH DURATION WARNING
This operation builds the system's foundational data layer, fetching deep historical data for approx 5500 active stocks. To prevent API bans, smart rate limiting is applied, making this process take several hours.

We STRONGLY recommend running this overnight or when idle. This performs heavy network IO and database writes.

5-Stage Data Engine Priming:
1. Sync stock list & industry concepts
2. Calibrate trade calendars
3. Backfill daily quotes & block trades
4. Hydrate full fundamentals (Reports, Indicators, Dividends)
5. Extract AI macro economics & top holder features

Patience is required for rigorous quant analysis. Continue?
